details: iOS 27 to support Google Cast and third-party AirPlay alternatives for EU DMA compliance. WWDC 2026 set for June 8-12 with major Siri AI overhauls.
NVIDIA GTC AI conference in Taipei (June 1-4) during COMPUTEX. H200 sales prospects in China remain uncertain despite Jensen Huang's recent visit to Beijing.

product: Chip Design Breakthrough / Ascend AI Expansion
details: Revealed chip design breakthroughs narrowing the gap with TSMC/Samsung. Expanding Ascend AI chip output (target: 750,000 units this year) as US export curbs impact competitors. Revenue expected to hit $12B in 2026.
Planning significant orders for Huawei's new AI chips alongside $30 billion investment in AI infrastructure. Seedance 2.0 AI video model showcased at Cannes.

product: New Inference Chip / Qwen AI Strategy
details: Developing a new AI chip focused on inferencing. Signed a sweeping deal with Pakistan for Qwen AI integration. Forecasts 30 billion yuan AI revenue in 2026.
DeepSeek V4 Pro tops global bang-for-buck rankings after making a 75% price cut permanent.
Xiaomi pouring billions into AI and custom chips to rival Apple and future-proof its hardware and EV empire.
